services.name: PTAC Installation
services.shortDescription: Professional PTAC unit installation for apartments, hotels, and commercial spaces throughout New York City.
services.longDescription: Packaged Terminal Air Conditioners are the backbone of climate control in New York apartments and commercial buildings. NewYork HVAC Solutions supplies and installs PTAC units from Amana, GE, and other leading manufacturers. We handle unit selection based on your room size and BTU requirements, delivery to your building, and professional installation that meets NYC building codes. Every installation includes a one-year workmanship warranty.
benefits: Exact-fit replacements for your existing sleeve
No hidden fees — upfront pricing always
services.metaTitle: PTAC Installation NYC | NewYork HVAC Solutions
services.metaDescription: Professional PTAC installation in New York City. Amana, GE, and Friedrich units with expert sizing and same-day delivery. Call (888) 311-8609.

services.name: AC Repair
services.shortDescription: Fast air conditioning repair for all system types. One-hour response time across New York City.
services.longDescription: When your AC goes down in the middle of a New York summer, waiting days for a repair is not an option. Our technicians diagnose and repair central air systems, ductless mini-splits, and PTAC units from all major brands. We stock common parts for faster turnaround and provide upfront pricing before any work begins. Most repairs are completed in a single visit so you can get back to comfort quickly.
services.metaTitle: AC Repair NYC | NewYork HVAC Solutions
services.metaDescription: Fast AC repair in New York City. One-hour response, upfront pricing, all brands serviced. Call (888) 311-8609.

services.name: Heating System Installation
services.shortDescription: Expert furnace, boiler, and heat pump installation for New York residential and commercial properties.
services.longDescription: New York winters demand a heating system you can count on. NewYork HVAC Solutions installs furnaces, boilers, heat pumps, and PTAC heating units sized correctly for your space. We guide you through equipment options based on your building type, energy goals, and budget, then handle every step from delivery to final testing. Our installations meet all NYC building codes and come with a full one-year warranty.
services.metaTitle: Heating Installation NYC | NewYork HVAC Solutions
services.metaDescription: Heating system installation in New York City. Furnaces, boilers, heat pumps. Free estimates from NewYork HVAC Solutions.

services.name: Heating Repair
services.shortDescription: Keep your building warm with professional furnace, boiler, and heat pump repair. Emergency service available.
services.longDescription: A broken heater during a New York cold snap is a serious problem. Our technicians are trained to repair furnaces, boilers, heat pumps, and PTAC heating systems from all major manufacturers. We arrive prepared with common parts and diagnostic tools to complete most repairs in a single visit. Every repair comes with transparent pricing and a satisfaction guarantee.
features: Furnace, boiler, and heat pump repair
services.metaTitle: Heating Repair NYC | NewYork HVAC Solutions
services.metaDescription: Heating repair in New York City for furnaces, boilers, and heat pumps. Emergency service available. Call (888) 311-8609.

services.name: HVAC Parts & Supply
services.shortDescription: Replacement HVAC parts, filters, and accessories with fast delivery across the New York metro area.
services.longDescription: Finding the right HVAC part shouldn't take days of searching. NewYork HVAC Solutions stocks a wide selection of filters, soft starters, control boards, thermostats, and accessories for all major HVAC brands. Our knowledgeable staff helps you identify the exact part you need and ships it fast. Whether you're a building superintendent, property manager, or homeowner, we make getting the right part simple.
features: Filters, soft starters, and control boards
services.metaTitle: HVAC Parts & Supply NYC | NewYork HVAC Solutions
services.metaDescription: HVAC replacement parts and supplies in New York. Filters, soft starters, accessories. Fast shipping from NewYork HVAC Solutions.

services.name: Preventive Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Seasonal HVAC maintenance to extend system life, prevent breakdowns, and keep energy costs down.
services.longDescription: Regular maintenance is the best way to extend your HVAC system's life and avoid costly emergency repairs. Our maintenance service covers all critical components including refrigerant levels, electrical connections, airflow, filters, and thermostat calibration. We service PTAC units, central air systems, furnaces, and boilers. Maintenance customers get priority scheduling and peace of mind knowing their system is running at peak efficiency.
services.metaTitle: HVAC Maintenance NYC | NewYork HVAC Solutions
services.metaDescription: Preventive HVAC maintenance in New York City. Seasonal tune-ups for PTAC units, AC, and heating systems. Call (888) 311-8609.

services.name: Ductless Mini-Split Installation
services.shortDescription: Energy-efficient ductless mini-split systems for New York apartments and homes without existing ductwork.
services.longDescription: Many New York buildings lack ductwork, making traditional central air impossible. Ductless mini-split systems provide efficient heating and cooling without the need for ducts, making them ideal for older apartments, additions, and converted spaces. We install single-zone and multi-zone systems from leading manufacturers, handling everything from unit selection to final commissioning.
features: Heating and cooling in one unit
services.metaTitle: Ductless Mini-Split NYC | NewYork HVAC Solutions
services.metaDescription: Ductless mini-split installation in New York City. No ductwork needed. Energy-efficient heating and cooling. Free estimates.
